# Balmoral Construction Inc.

> Boutique custom home builder in the Sea to Sky Corridor, BC. Based in Pemberton, building in Whistler, Pemberton, and Squamish since 2011.

## About

Balmoral Construction is a boutique custom home builder and general contractor based in Pemberton, British Columbia. Founded by Marc Harvey in 2011, the company intentionally limits the number of projects taken on each year to ensure hands-on owner involvement in every build. With 20+ years of combined experience in residential and commercial construction, the team specializes in custom homes, large-scale renovations, general contracting, and project management across the Sea to Sky Corridor.

## Services

- Custom Home Building: Ground-up custom homes designed for the Sea to Sky climate and lifestyle
- Home Renovations: Large-scale interior and exterior renovations with full project management
- General Contracting: Standard to innovative residential construction methods
- Project Management: Expert oversight from pre-construction through to completion
- Land Consultation: Property evaluation and lot assessment
- Building Permit Coordination: Municipal liaison and permitting management

## Service Areas

- Whistler, BC (primary)
- Pemberton, BC (headquarters)
- Squamish, BC
- Sea to Sky Corridor, BC

## Team

- Marc Harvey — Owner & Founder. Journeyman carpenter, 20+ years experience.
- Jeremy Lewis — Project Manager. 20+ years experience.
- Jonny Tweedie — Project Manager. 17 years finishing carpentry and site management.
- Britt Lothrop — Affiliated interior designer. Design-build partner since 2014.

## Credentials

- BC New Home Warranty Registration
- National Home Warranty Registration
- Canadian Home Builders Association — Sea to Sky

- Instagram: @balmoralconstruction

## Portfolio

Notable projects include Warbler Way (Whistler), Cerulean (Pemberton), White Gold & White Gold 2 (Whistler), Sugarloaf (Pemberton), Fitzsimmons & Fitzsimmons North (Whistler), Eagle (Pemberton), Mountain View (Whistler), and Drifter (Whistler).
